summary: Completed testing of bug fix and new features: Supplier creation error handling, GRN 'Create from PO' dropdown, PO 'Receive as GRN' option, and GRN SKU field disabled logic. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly.

frontend: Suppliers page - Add Supplier dialog opens
Supplier creation with valid email - success toast shown
Supplier creation with invalid email - browser validation shown (no React crash)
Bug fix verified: No 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error
GRN page - 'Create from PO' dropdown visible when pending POs exist
GRN page - 'New GRN' button opens form
GRN form - SKU field editable for new product
GRN form - SKU field shows '(from product)' label and gray background for existing product
Purchase Orders page - Create PO dialog works
Purchase Orders page - 'Receive as GRN' option visible in dropdown for pending POs

seed_data_creation: Created test suppliers and purchase order during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for supplier creation error handling verified. New features tested: 1) GRN 'Create from PO' dropdown shows pending POs, 2) PO dropdown has 'Receive as GRN' option for pending POs, 3) GRN form SKU field is disabled when existing product selected. WooCommerce integration is implemented but not tested with live credentials.

supplier_bug_fix.issue: React error 'Objects are not valid as a React child' when creating supplier with invalid email
supplier_bug_fix.fix_verified: Error handling in handleSubmit extracts error messages properly from Pydantic validation errors
supplier_bug_fix.test_result: Invalid email shows browser validation, valid email creates supplier with success toast

grn_create_from_po.feature: 'Create from PO' dropdown in GRN page
grn_create_from_po.test_result: Dropdown visible when pending POs exist, shows PO number and supplier name

po_receive_as_grn.feature: 'Receive as GRN' option in PO dropdown menu
po_receive_as_grn.test_result: Option visible for pending POs, navigates to GRN page with po_id parameter

grn_sku_field.feature: SKU field disabled when existing product selected
grn_sku_field.test_result: SKU field shows '(from product)' label and gray background when existing product selected

mocked_apis.woocommerce: WooCommerce sync endpoints implemented but require actual store credentials
